checkout_path.exact_checkout_url: POST to /__public-checkout, or to `${NEXT_PUBLIC_ABANDO_API_BASE || NEXT_PUBLIC_ABANDO_BACKEND_ORIGIN}/__public-checkout` when an API base is configured
evidence: The code falls back to a relative /__public-checkout endpoint when no base URL is configured
No in-repo handler for /__public-checkout was found

fulfillment_trigger_location.what_it_does: Rebuilds shopifixer_fulfillment_truth_v1.json from client registry and delivery units
fulfillment_trigger_location.missing_runtime_bridge: No runtime handler was found that calls the fulfillment builder or mutates fulfillment truth after a verified payment

evidence_available: The checkout request body includes plan=scale and store_domain
missing_links: No proof that this endpoint returns a real payment link in the checked-in codebase

evidence_available: Stripe webhook code handles checkout.session.completed in a legacy route
recordVerifiedStripePayment exists and can set deal.payment_status to paid
missing_links: The current ShopiFixer checkout path does not call recordStripePaymentPropagation
The legacy webhook route only sends a magic link and does not update ShopiFixer payment truth

evidence_available: It also writes the offer_sent -> deal_won style payment note
missing_links: No live ShopiFixer runtime call into this function was found from the current checkout flow

evidence_available: The fulfillment builder knows how to mark an item as payment_received when client truth is paid
missing_links: No runtime bridge rebuilds or updates fulfillment truth after payment

blockers: The ShopiFixer page posts to /__public-checkout, but no in-repo handler for that endpoint was found.
The only verified-payment writer is client_registry_v1.mjs, but the ShopiFixer checkout path does not call it.
The only fulfillment truth writer is an offline builder, not a runtime post-payment handler.
The app_legacy Stripe webhook path handles checkout.session.completed for magic-link issuance, not ShopiFixer payment truth.
Fulfillment truth remains waiting_for_payment and cannot advance automatically from the current ShopiFixer flow.
smallest_repair: Wire the ShopiFixer checkout success/webhook path to call staffordos/revenue/revenue_agent_v1.mjs:recordStripePaymentPropagation (or recordVerifiedStripePayment) for the same merchant, then rebuild staffordos/fulfillment/shopifixer_fulfillment_truth_v1.json from the paid client record so the fulfillment item can move to payment_received.
exact_next_repair: Add the missing runtime bridge from the ShopiFixer payment completion event to recordStripePaymentPropagation.
Ensure the same merchant identity is passed through the payment event payload.
Rebuild shopifixer_fulfillment_truth_v1.json from the now-paid client registry truth.
what_becomes_provable_after_payment: The offer became a paid ShopiFixer Fix Sprint.
The client registry records paid revenue truth.
The fulfillment item is eligible to start and can move to payment_received.
The downstream proof package can be materialized from the fulfillment authority.

checkout_path.note: The checkout URL is environment-dependent and no in-repo handler was found.

payment_authority_location.note: Payment authority exists, but it is not wired into the current ShopiFixer checkout flow.

fulfillment_trigger_location.note: The fulfillment truth is generated offline; no runtime trigger was found.

readiness_score.source_field: offer + checkout + payment + fulfillment bridge completeness
readiness_score.note: The path is partially wired but not end-to-end.

smallest_repair.note: Bridge the payment event into existing truth writers, then rebuild fulfillment truth.
